pain_points: Proposal writing takes 3-4 weeks per engagement and relies on individual consultants remembering past projects
Resource allocation is done by the VP of Delivery on a whiteboard — no system, no data
context: Met with VP of Delivery and Managing Director. They are actively evaluating Microsoft Copilot but have not deployed it. The biggest pain is institutional knowledge loss — when a senior consultant leaves, their project knowledge disappears. They have 15 years of project documents in SharePoint but nobody has ever searched it systematically. Resource scheduling is the second pain: they miss billable hours because the right consultant is on the wrong project. No analytics team, no data warehouse, no one who can code.
